tasks.label: Start Frontend (stable)
args: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 >/dev/null && npm --prefix frontend run dev -- --host localhost

tasks.label: Restart Frontend
args: pkill -f vite || true; source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 >/dev/null && npm --prefix frontend run dev -- --host localhost

tasks.label: Restart Frontend + Open
args: pkill -f 'vite --port 3000' || true; source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 25 >/dev/null && nohup npm --prefix frontend run dev -- --host localhost >/tmp/frontend-vite.log 2>&1 & sleep 2; open http://localhost:3000

tasks.label: Restart Frontend + Open
args: pkill -f "vite --port 3000" || true; source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 25 >/dev/null && nohup npm --prefix frontend run dev -- --host localhost >/tmp/frontend-vite.log 2>&1 & sleep 2; open http://localhost:3000
